items.title: 'I would never say that' - US Olympian on White House AI video
items.description: USA men's ice hockey player Brady Tkachuk distances himself from an AI-enhanced White House video in which he appears to disparage Canadians, saying "those words would never come out of my mouth".

items.title: Helmer (5) er en del av «Verdens fineste lag»: – Setter livet i perspektiv
